title: Work and Opportunities for Women (WOW) programme: Women’s economic empowerment in Ukraine
body: "This report explores 2 questions:    Since Russia’s full-scale invasion of Ukraine in February 2022, what have been the main barriers and opportunities for women’s economic empowerment in Ukraine?   Drawing on evidence from Ukraine and other fragile and conflict-affected settings, what entry points could support women’s economic empowerment in the British Embassy in Kyiv’s gender equality, disability and social inclusion (GEDSI) strategy?   "
